no_smuggling_gates_declared.rationale: APF2's w_0 = -58/61, w_a = -16/61 are rational structural derivations from LATEST-62 endpoint-uniqueness + barycentric-pivot + capacity-response-ratio argument; refitting them would smuggle the data into the structural claim.

next_gate: MCMC convergence: 4 chains per (dataset x model) reaching R-1 < 0.01 with ESS >= 200; then adjudication via declared profile-delta gate (Delta chi^2 <= 5.991) and no-smuggling discipline (APF2's w_2(a) coefficients structurally frozen at LATEST-62, not refitted). Once chains converge and the adjudicator reports per-dataset Delta chi^2 values satisfying the gates, the next-gate closure becomes a LATEST-83-or-later result pack.
